summary: Full E2E backend + frontend testing for KostCharge boarding house billing app. All critical flows verified: auth, tenant CRUD, invoice creation with auto-calculation, serial numbering, PDF generation, mark-as-paid, dashboard stats, filtering, settings, and UI navigation with i18n. No blocker bugs found. Previously reported ObjectId serialization fixes are confirmed working.
passed: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with user and sets HttpOnly cookies
POST /api/tenants creates tenant successfully (id: 6a4d268343deb7e474a3e1fd, name: E2E Tenant A)
POST /api/invoices creates invoice with correct auto-calculation: electricity_cost=(150-100)*1500=75000, water_cost=2*30000=60000, total=1500000+75000+60000+0=1635000
Serial numbering increments correctly: INV-202607-0001, INV-202607-0002, INV-202607-0003
GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF (%PDF-1.4 magic, 2503 bytes)
GET /api/dashboard/stats reflects updated counts (pending decreased from 3 to 2, uncollected recalculated from 4905000 -> 3270000)
GET /api/invoices?status=paid filter returns only paid invoices
Frontend login flow works, redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard UI renders stats card (Rp 3.270.000, 3 Total Penyewa, 2 Pending, 0 Overdue)
Tenants page (/tenants) displays all 3 tenants incl. E2E Tenant A - A201
Invoices page (/invoices) shows all 3 invoices with serials and status badges (Lunas/Pending)
Indonesian i18n active by default (Penyewa, Tagihan, Pengaturan, Lunas, Kata Sandi, Masuk)
notes: Original test request used PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/status but actual endpoint is POST /api/invoices/{id}/mark-paid. Endpoint works correctly, just different signature - not a bug.
Two 401 console errors on landing page are expected (initial /api/auth/me check before login cookies present).

WebSocket real-time sync, multi-currency formatting (USD/CNY/KHR), language switching to EN/ZH/KM, edit/delete tenant, and logout/re-login session persistence were NOT deeply tested in this latency-sensitive pass - deferred to full testing agent.
Test credentials read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (admin@kostcharge.com / admin123) - working.
